entry.title: NOIP2000 方格取数
entry.content:
DP
原题

#include<iostream>
using namespace std;
int f[11][11][11][11];
bool mark[11][11][11][11];
int a[11][11];
int n;
int dfs(int x1,int y1,int x2,int y2)
{
	//cout<<x1<<" "<<y1<<" "<<x2<<" "<<y2<<endl;
	if(mark[x1][y1][x2][y2]==1)
		return f[x1][y1][x2][y2];
	//cout<<1;
	if(x1==y1&&y1==x2&&x2==y2&&y2==1)
		return a[x1][y1];
	//cout<<2;
	if(x1<1||x2<1||y1<1||y2<1||x1>n||x2>n||y1>n||y2>n)
		return -(1<<30);
	//cout<<3;
	int ret=0;
	if(x1==x2&&y1==y2)
	{
		ret=a[x1][y1];
	}
	else
	{
		ret=a[x1][y1]+a[x2][y2];
	}
	int maxx=0;
	int xp[]={0,-1};
	int yp[]={-1,0};
	//cout<<5;
	for(int i=0;i<2;++i)
		for(int j=0;j<2;++j)
		{
		//	cout<<4;
			maxx=max(maxx,dfs(x1+xp[i],y1+yp[i],x2+xp[j],y2+yp[j]));
		}
	ret+=maxx;
	f[x1][y1][x2][y2]=ret;
	mark[x1][y1][x2][y2]=1;
	return ret;
}
int main()
{
	cin>>n;
	int x,y,z;
	while(cin>>x>>y>>z)
	{
		if(x==y&&y==z&&z==0)
			break;
		a[x][y]=z;
	}
	cout<<dfs(n,n,n,n);
	return 0;
}

AC

entry.title: LCA
entry.content:
原题

#include<iostream>
using namespace std;
struct edge{
	int y,next;
}edges[100001];
int first[1000001],ta=0;
void addE(int x,int y)
{
	edges[++ta].y=y;
	edges[ta].next=first[x];
	first[x]=ta;
}
int fa[100001][1001];
int dep[100001];
int n,m,s;
bool mark[1000001];
int mx[1000001];
void dfs(int x,int f)
{
	dep[x]=dep[f]+1;
	fa[x][0]=f;
	//int fr;
	if(mark[x]==1)
	{
		for(int i=1;i<=mx[x];++i)
			fa[x][i]=fa[fa[x][i-1]][i-1];
	}
	else
	{
		int maxx=0;
		for(int i=1;dep[x]-(1<<i)>=0;++i)
		{
			maxx=i;
			fa[x][i]=fa[fa[x][i-1]][i-1];
		}
		mark[x]=1;
		mx[x]=maxx;
	}
	for(int i=first[x];i;i=edges[i].next)
		if(edges[i].y!=f)
			dfs(edges[i].y,x);
}
int go(int x,int l,int p)
{
	if(l==0)
		return x;
	if(l%2==1)
		return go(fa[x][p],l>>1,p+1);
	return go(x,l>>1,p+1);
}
int LCA(int x,int y)
{
	if(dep[x]<dep[y])
		swap(x,y);
	x=go(x,dep[x]-dep[y],0);
	if(x==y)
		return x;
	for(int i=mx[x];i>=0;--i)
	{
		if(fa[x][i]!=fa[y][i])
		{
			x=fa[x][i];
			y=fa[y][i];
		}
	}
	return fa[x][0];
}
int main()
{
	cin>>n>>m>>s;
	for(int i=1;i<n;++i)
	{
		int x,y;
		cin>>x>>y;
		addE(x,y);
		addE(y,x);
	}
	dfs(s,0);
	for(int i=1;i<=m;++i)
	{
		int x,y;
		cin>>x>>y;
		cout<<LCA(x,y)<<endl;
	}
	return 0;
}

AC
